messages.help_intro: 👋 Welcome to the shipment tracking bot!
messages.help_intro_body: Track your parcels from multiple carriers in one place — no more jumping between websites or missing important updates. ✨ Key features • Add a tracking code and see its status instantly • Automatic periodic checks with Telegram notifications on every update • Full shipment history for every order • Supports: JT Express, Shopee Express, GHN 🚀 Getting started 1. Tap ➕ Add Order → pick a carrier → paste your tracking code 2. Or just send the tracking code directly in chat — the bot detects the carrier automatically 3. Tap any order to view its details and full history
messages.help_how_to_add_body: Option 1 — Auto-detect Send the tracking code directly in chat. The bot will identify the carrier on its own. Option 2 — Manual carrier selection Tap ➕ Add Order, choose the carrier, then paste the code. 📦 Supported carriers • JT Express — codes starting with JT or 10–15 digit numbers • Shopee Express — codes starting with SPX, SLS or VN • GHN — codes starting with VNGH or 8-character alphanumeric codes 💳 Credits Adding a new order costs 1 credit. Re-adding an existing order is free.
messages.help_notifications_body: The bot periodically checks all active orders. When a status changes you receive a Telegram notification immediately. You can enable or disable notifications per order by tapping the order → 🔔/🔕 button. Delivered orders stop being monitored automatically.
messages.tap_order_hint: Tap an order below to view details.
messages.error.insufficient_credits: You have no credits left. A new order cannot be added.
messages.error.tracking_fetch_failed: Could not retrieve tracking information. Please check the code and try again later.
messages.admin_forbidden: ⛔ You do not have access to the admin dashboard.
messages.mission_problem: Shipping information is scattered across different websites. Customers must check each tracking code manually and can easily miss important updates.
messages.mission_solution: The bot brings orders into one place, checks their status automatically, stores their journey and notifies customers whenever something changes.
messages.mission_commitment: Making shipment tracking simpler, more proactive and less time-consuming.
messages.admin_broadcast_prompt: Enter the content to send to every user. Your next message will be broadcast immediately.
messages.add_credit_contact_owner: Please contact the Bot Owner for help adding credits. Automatic credit top-ups will be available later.
messages.jt_enter_phone: Enter the last 4 digits of recipient's phone number:
messages.jt_format_invalid: Invalid format. Please use format: tracking code-last 4 digits of phone
messages.admin_credits_hint:
Send a number to add or subtract credits.
Examples: 50 (add 50), -20 (subtract 20)
messages.admin_credits_invalid: ❌ Invalid input. Please send a number (e.g. 50 or -20).
